visa_types.name: Short Stay with EU or German Spouse/Parent/Child
visa_types.documents_required:
Documents Required
!! ATTENTION APPLICANTS OF ESTONIA !! - PLEASE CLICK HERE (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bgd/en/deu/news/estonia-visa-applicants) FOR IMPORTANT INFORMATION APPLICABLE FOR BANGLADESH. VISIT THE LINK OF REPUBLIC OF ESTONIA - MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS (https://vm.ee/en/consular-visa-and-travel-information/visa-information/estonian-representations-which-are-handling) - FOR DETAILED INFORMATION !!
2024 VFS Requirements for Family Member (German): No visa fee will be charged for spouses of German citizens / minor children of German citizens / parents of Germans under 18. This information sheet is only for German Spouse/Parent/Child.
All other relatives may apply for a normal tourism visa with a visa fee. They can add that they want to visit their German relatives. E.g.- nephew can visit his uncle, who is a German citizenship holder and nephew is required to pay visa fees.

2024 VFS Requirements for Family Members (EU Citizen): Proof is needed that the EU Citizen pays alimony regularly for all relatives that are not children under 21 or spouses. This information sheet is for all the relatives of an EU Citizen. All of them are exempted from the fees.
Separate Checklists for German and EU.
Information on Travel Insurance: Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
Accepted Medical Insurance:
All travel/overseas health insurances are accepted that have been issued from any insurance company in Bangladesh or abroad, if it fulfills the following two conditions:
- Valid for the entire duration of the requested visa and for all Schengen countries
- Minimum coverage 30,000EURO and repatriation. (Medical insurances of credit cards are not accepted)
For more information on documents required (checklists) Please click here to access Checklist for Short Stay with German spouse/child/parent.
For more information on documents required (checklists) Please click here to access Checklist for Short Stay with EU citizen.
Please click here (https://dhaka.diplo.de/bd-en/service/visa-einreise/-/2669542) for "barrier free" access to the "Declaration of Consent" form by the Embassy of the Federal Republic of Germany in Dhaka, Bangladesh.
visa_types.visa_fees:
!! ATTENTION APPLICANTS OF ESTONIA !! - PLEASE CLICK HERE (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bgd/en/deu/news/estonia-visa-applicants) FOR IMPORTANT INFORMATION APPLICABLE FOR BANGLADESH. VISIT THE LINK OF REPUBLIC OF ESTONIA - MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS (https://vm.ee/en/consular-visa-and-travel-information/visa-information/estonian-representations-which-are-handling) - FOR DETAILED INFORMATION !!

[deu > bgd > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

The following persons will be exempted from Schengen Visa fees:
- Children below the age of 6 years
- Spouses/same sex partners and minor children of German citizens as well as parents to minor German nationals.
- Spouses/same sex partners and minor children of EU/EEA nationals, provided they enjoy free movement
Visa fee to be paid only in Cash.
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Along with the visa fees, there is a service charge applicable per visa application. To book an appointment with Germany Visa Application Centre in Dhaka, prepayment of the following service fee is mandatory.
VFS Global logistics/service fees BDT 2,655/- (Inclusive of VAT)
Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[deu > bgd > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 2]
The service fees and all optional services are to be paid in following mode of payment. (Inclusive of VAT)
Mode of payment:
Online Payment Gateway
Cash (Bangladeshi Taka)
Credit card
Debit card
visa_types.processing_time:
!! ATTENTION APPLICANTS OF ESTONIA !! - PLEASE CLICK HERE (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/bgd/en/deu/news/estonia-visa-applicants) FOR IMPORTANT INFORMATION APPLICABLE FOR BANGLADESH. VISIT THE LINK OF REPUBLIC OF ESTONIA - MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS (https://vm.ee/en/consular-visa-and-travel-information/visa-information/estonian-representations-which-are-handling) - FOR DETAILED INFORMATION !!
- The processing time at the Embassy due to necessary and obligatory legal requirements takes up to 15 calendar days or more and can vary in certain cases as per Embassy's decision
.ATTENTION: Please note Currently not possible to give an exact estimate of the processing time.
- Applicants are requested to apply well in advance, but – due to legal requirements - not more than six months prior to the intended date of journey.
 
Schengen Visa applications can be handed in up to 6 months prior to the intended trip (seaman 9 months prior)
- Status updates during the regular processing time are not entertained.
- During the whole processing time the passport must remain with the German Embassy.
- Passports can only be withdrawn in case a written request by the customer is presented to the Embassy.
- Passport will be handed over directly by the Embassy or via VFS as per mission instruction.
NOTE: Special rules might apply for some nationals whose passports are not recognized by the German authorities. You might be re-quested to come personally to the Embassy. Visa processing will take more time.

This category of visa caters to people who wish to visit Germany or any of the Countries represented by the Embassy of Germany in Dhaka for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. 
                                                                        
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that are represented by German Embassy, 
                                                                    Dhaka. Please click on the tabs above to obtain the required information about your visa application.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the Embassy or Consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application to the German Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the Embassy or the Consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that are represented by the German Embassy, Dhaka.
Please click on the tabs above to obtain the required information about your visa application.

Ensure that you select the correct visa category when submitting your application on the Consular Service Portal (CSP) and the VFS payment module. Payments made under an incorrect visa category are not eligible for refunds.For more information on Study Visa Processing by German Embassy please visit the Embassy's link below:Germany Embassy Dhaka: Information regarding Study Visa (https://dhaka.diplo.de/bd-en/service/2685884-2685884?openAccordionId=item-2685890-3-panel)For information on Consular Service Portal, please visit: Consular Services Portal | Visa at a glance (https://digital.diplo.de/visa)Please note VFS is currently providing service for following NATIONAL VISA categories only:
- Study Visa-MASTER STUDENTS : Applicants will be contacted by the German Embassy.
- Study Visa- QUALIFIED STUDENTS: Applicants need to apply through Consular Service portal (CSP)

This visa is solely for “Qualified Students” applying for the duration of more than 90 days.
Whether you are a qualified student is determined by the questionnaire within the Consular Service Portal. Qualified students are for example (PhD students and Scholarship holders)
Please read carefully the following “Document requirement”, “Photo Specifications”, “Download Form” and “Processing time” to prepare your application according to the requirements of the German Embassy in Dhaka, Bangladesh.
Please note:

- VFS service fee is mandatory for successful submission of application and biometrics.

Schengen Visa applications can be handed in up to 6 months prior to the intended trip (seaman 9 months prior)
- Status updates during the regular processing time are not entertained.
- During the whole processing time the passport must remain with the German Embassy.
- Passports can only be withdrawn in case a written request by the customer is presented to the Embassy.
- Passport will be handed over directly by the Embassy or via VFS as per mission instruction.
NOTE: Special rules might apply for some nationals whose passports are not recognized by the German authorities. You might be re-quested to come personally to the Embassy. Visa processing will take more time.
